name: Brown Rice & Lentil Stew (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz Canned tomatoes, peeled and cut
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a Dutch oven or large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 55 minutes to 1 hour, or until rice is tender.
4. Remove and discard the bay leaf.
